coverage_notes: Strong coverage of HRV-guided training with 2 RCTs (Kiviniemi 2007, Vesterinen 2016), 1 cluster-RCT in professional runners (Carrasco-Poyatos 2022), and 2 systematic reviews/meta-analyses (Manresa-Rocamora 2021, Granero-Gallegos 2020). Consumer device validity covered by Plews 2017 smartphone PPG validation and Bellenger 2021 WHOOP validation. Overtraining detection covered by Bellenger 2016 systematic review. Excluded Plews 2013 and Plews 2014 as instructed. Gap: no large-scale prospective study in recreational runners; limited masters-specific data.

papers.title: Heart Rate Variability-Guided Training for Enhancing Cardiac-Vagal Modulation, Aerobic Fitness, and Endurance Performance: A Methodological Systematic Review with Meta-Analysis
papers.journal: International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed and meta-analyzed studies comparing HRV-guided versus predefined training on cardiac-vagal modulation, aerobic fitness, and endurance performance.

papers.title: HRV-Based Training for Improving VO2max in Endurance Athletes. A Systematic Review with Meta-Analysis
papers.journal: International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed RCTs comparing HRV-guided training to predefined training for VO2max improvement in endurance athletes.

papers.title: Monitoring Athletic Training Status Through Autonomic Heart Rate Regulation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed and meta-analyzed 27 studies examining how autonomic HR regulation indices (including HRV) respond to changes in training status in athletes.

papers.title: Endurance training guided individually by daily heart rate variability measurements
papers.notes: Randomized 26 moderately fit males into HRV-guided, predefined, and control groups to compare daily HRV-based training prescription versus traditional periodization over 4 weeks.

papers.title: Individual Endurance Training Prescription with Heart Rate Variability
papers.notes: Randomized 40 recreational endurance runners into HRV-guided and predefined training groups to examine whether daily HRV can individualize the timing of vigorous training sessions.

papers.title: Heart rate variability-guided training in professional runners: Effects on performance and vagal modulation
papers.notes: Conducted an 8-week cluster-RCT comparing HRV-guided versus traditional training in 12 professional endurance runners on performance and vagal modulation outcomes.

papers.title: Comparison of Heart-Rate-Variability Recording With Smartphone Photoplethysmography, Polar H7 Chest Strap, and Electrocardiography
papers.journal: International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance
papers.notes: Validated smartphone PPG (HRV4Training) and chest strap rMSSD measurements against ECG in 29 subjects during guided and normal breathing conditions.

papers.title: Practices and Applications of Heart Rate Variability Monitoring in Endurance Athletes
papers.notes: Reviewed current practices and practical applications of HRV monitoring in endurance athletes, covering analysis techniques, consumer tools, training prescription, and performance prediction.
